title: Spicy Keny Sunflower Oil Kenya Stir-fry
description: A tangy and silky solo-dinner dish featuring sunflower oil, ferment, and other Kenyan ingredients for a halal-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat sunflower oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sliced chili pepper to the hot oil and stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Gradually add water and salt, stirring constantly to prevent sticking. Bring to a boil.
Stir in fermented fish sauce and ground peanuts, continuing to cook for another 2-3 minutes until thickened slightly but still liquid.
If desired, stir through chopped fresh parsley at the end of cooking.
Serve immediately as a solo-dinner dish with rice or naan bread.
